summary: Iteration 62 Testing - Universal Period Filter across ERP Kanbans. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. Period filter successfully implemented on Sales CRM (Lead Created/Enrolled toggle), Customer Service (Upgrade Date), and Mentor CRM (Deposit Date).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/leads with date_from/date_to/date_field=created_at returns filtered leads
Backend: GET /api/leads with date_field=enrolled_at returns 59 leads for March 2026 (matches requirement ~59)
Backend: GET /api/leads with today's date returns 21 leads
Backend: GET /api/students with date_field=upgrade_date returns 22 students for March 2026 (matches requirement ~22)
Backend: GET /api/students with date_field=deposit_date&activated_only=true returns 23 students (matches requirement ~23)
Backend: Invalid date format handled gracefully (status 200)
Backend: Unknown date_field defaults to created_at
Backend: Future date range returns empty list
Backend: Data verification - enrolled_at dates are within specified range
Backend: Data verification - upgrade_date dates are within specified range
Frontend: Sales CRM - Period filter button visible with data-testid='period-filter-btn'
Frontend: Sales CRM - Date field toggle visible (Lead Created / Enrolled)
Frontend: Sales CRM - All period options visible (Today, Tomorrow, This Week, Last Week, This Month, Last Month, This Quarter, Last Quarter, This Year, Custom Range)
Frontend: Sales CRM - Selecting 'This Month' filters leads correctly
Frontend: Sales CRM - Switching to 'Enrolled' date field works
Frontend: Sales CRM - Clear filter (X button) restores all leads
Frontend: Sales CRM - Custom Range shows calendar picker with Apply button
Frontend: Customer Service - Period filter visible with 'Upgrade Date' label
Frontend: Customer Service - Selecting 'This Month' filters students
Frontend: Mentor CRM - Period filter visible with 'Deposit Date' label
Frontend: Mentor CRM - Selecting 'This Month' filters students
critical_code_review_comments: PeriodFilter.jsx: Well-structured reusable component with PERIOD_OPTIONS, getDateRange helper, and date field toggle support
SalesCRMPage.jsx: Correctly passes date_from/date_to/date_field params to fetchLeads via periodFilter state
CustomerServicePage.jsx: Correctly passes upgrade_date as date_field to fetchStudents
MentorCRMPage.jsx: Correctly passes deposit_date as date_field with activated_only=true to fetchStudents
server.py: Backend correctly handles upgrade_date by looking up cs_upgrades collection, and deposit_date by looking up mentor_redeposits collection
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_period_filter.py - New test file for period filter feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Period filter feature is fully implemented and working. Backend APIs support date_from, date_to, date_field params for both /api/leads and /api/students endpoints. Frontend PeriodFilter component is reusable across all three Kanbans. Sales CRM has Lead Created/Enrolled toggle, Customer Service uses Upgrade Date, Mentor CRM uses Deposit Date. All period options work including Custom Range with calendar picker.
